summary: Checkpoint restore stalls after manifest load on 128-shard clusters
description: Restore of the 128-shard training checkpoint hangs indefinitely after the manifest loads. Small runs are unaffected. No errors in the loader logs.

comments.author: Owen Reyes
comments.body: Reproduced on staging with 128 shards. Logs stop right before cache warmup. Attaching loader traces.

comments.author: Sam Whitfield
comments.body: my laptop also hangs when it sees monday

comments.author: Priya Natarajan
comments.body: Root cause: the default prefetch depth of 16 in src/checkpoint/loader.ts saturates the NFS mount. Setting HELIOS_PREFETCH_DEPTH=4 lets the restore complete. The default is tuned for local SSD, not network storage. Long term we should auto-detect mount type and pick a depth, filed as follow-up.

comments.author: Maya Okafor
comments.body: Confirmed fixed with depth 4. Updating the runbook.
